login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your server

Settings.title: Server Settings
Settings.description: Manage the Assetto Corsa server_cfg.ini file.
Settings.saveSuccess: Settings saved. Restart the server to apply.

general.title: Basic Information
general.description: How your server will appear in the lobby.

network.title: Network Settings
network.description: If you change ports here, you must also update docker-compose.yml.

rules.title: Driving Assists
rules.description: Define what is allowed on your server.
rules.tcDesc: Prevents wheel spin when exiting corners.
rules.tyreBranketsDesc: Tyres start pre-heated from the pits.

sessions.title: Session Duration
sessions.description: Set the duration of practice, qualifying and race sessions.

ConfigEditor.title: Config File Editor
ConfigEditor.description: Directly edit .ini and .yml configuration files shared between the manager and the AC server.
ConfigEditor.hint: Changes take effect after restarting the AC server.

Users.title: User Management
Users.description: Add and manage users who can access the AC Manager.
Users.newUserDescription: Create a new account to access the manager.
Users.name: Full Name

Errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to access this page.
Errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this resource.
Errors.serverError: An internal error occurred. Please try again.

Content.title: Content Manager
Content.description: Install new mods (Cars or Tracks) or view existing content.
Content.installUrlDetail: Paste the direct link (.zip) for the server to download.
Content.installUrlHint: Direct download links only. Sites like Mediafire may fail.
Content.extracting: Extracting, analyzing files and syncing. This may take a few minutes...

EntryList.title: Grid Setup
EntryList.description: Choose the location and machines for the next session.
EntryList.selectCarError: Please select at least one car!
EntryList.maxClientsError: This track supports a maximum of {max} slots.
EntryList.saveSuccess: Grid updated! Pitboxes have been generated and distributed successfully.
EntryList.gridSizeDesc: How many racers can join the server.
EntryList.gridSizeLimitError: Value exceeds the selected track limit!
EntryList.carRosterDesc: Select allowed vehicles. The system will distribute the {max} slots equally among chosen cars.
EntryList.noCars: No cars registered in the database. Install mods first!
